description:
Welcome to Consumer TV

Consumer TV is an initiative of Consumer Protection Cell (A Government Registered Organization working for the welfare and rights of consumers mainly in insurance sector). Insurance Companies delay/deny insurance claims due to unfair trade practice, deficiency of services and harassment by the insurance companies so we are here to educate, guide, and empower you to fight for your legal rights.

🔹 Are you facing issues with your insurance companies and feeling harassed?
🔹 Do you feel insurance companies are unfairly rejecting claims of Indian Consumers?
🔹 Want to know how to get the best benefits from your policy as per law?

📌 We have Experts to help you for 

✅ Step-by-step insurance claim guidance 
✅ Protection of your Consumer rights.
✅ Exposing unfair practices by insurance companies
✅ Real-life cases to educate you.

💡Subscribe to Consumer TV.

📩 Need help or want to give suggestion?

Contact us at cpc.india@yahoo.com or Whatsapp Only at 9540-160-160
